# Energetische Massage Bonn

> Energetische Massage in Bonn — achtsame Berührung, klare Grenzen und tiefe Entspannung. Termine nach Vereinbarung.

## Business Info

- Name: Energetische Massage Bonn (Königs Massage)
- Owner: Anastasia König
- Type: Massage & Wellness (HealthAndBeautyBusiness)
- Location: Bonn, NRW, Germany
- Phone: +49 176 41107158
- Email: info@energetische-massage-bonn.de
- Website: https://www.energetische-massage-bonn.de
- Languages: German (default), English, Turkish
- Appointments: By arrangement only

## Service

Energetische Entspannungsmassage (Energetic Relaxation Massage) — a holistic massage combining classical techniques with energetic bodywork. Through mindful touch, energy blockages are released, the body's self-healing powers are activated, and a state of deep relaxation is achieved. Particularly suitable for stress-related tension, emotional exhaustion, and holistic renewal.

## Approach

Anastasia König works with gratitude and intuition. Sessions begin with a moment of gratitude and individual intentions for each client. She often works with eyes closed to stay present and perceive subtle tension patterns, breathing rhythm, and nervous system signals. Techniques learned in Thailand and other travels flow into an intuitive, mindful practice — always individual and respectful.

## Values

- Clear boundaries, safety, and respectful interaction
- Careful preparation of the space; hygiene is a given
- Sessions do not replace medical diagnosis or treatment
- Focus on relaxation and supporting body awareness
